name: Venus Remedies Limited
summary: Venus Remedies Limited, a pharmaceutical company, manufactures and trades in medicines in India and internationally. The company offers Sterloc, a super oxidized solution; Swachh Guard, an alcohol-based instant hand sanitizer; Trois Spray, a nanotech emulsion; and Trois Tablet to manage acute pain with topical applications. It offers its products in various therapeutic segments comprising analgesic, analgesic and antipyretic, anti-diabetic, antibiotic, cardiac, disinfectant and antiseptic, gastro therapy, hand sanitizers, hormones, iron supplements, neurology, oncology, pain management, respiratory, skin care, stress reliever, urology, vitamins/minerals/nutrients, and wound management. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Panchkula, India.
